74:8: فَإِذَا نُقِرَ فِى <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed><tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َاق<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ُو</tajweed>رِ
